revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月廿六]][[zh:四月廿六]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 26|qq=April 26}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Shōtai|en|Shōtai|qid=Q1324780|lt=Shōtai|1=Shōtai}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|898|en|898|qid=Q24131|lt=898|1=898}} {{ill|May 20|en|May 20|qid=Q2579|lt=May 20|1=May 20}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kanpyō (era)|en|Kanpyō (era)|qid=Q1346292|lt=Kanpyō|1=Kanpyō (era)}} to {{ill|Shōtai|en|Shōtai|qid=Q1324780|lt=Shōtai|1=Shōtai}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Chengping|en|Chengping|qid=Q11076356|lt=Shōhei|1=Chengping}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|931|en|931|qid=Q24789|lt=931|1=931}} {{ill|May 16|en|May 16|qid=Q2574|lt=May 16|1=May 16}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enchō|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97379316}} to {{ill|Chengping|en|Chengping|qid=Q11076356|lt=Shōhei|1=Chengping}}. * {{ill|Karyaku|en|Karyaku|qid=Q1327198|lt=Kareki|1=Karyaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1326|en|1326|qid=Q5782|lt=1326|1=1326}} {{ill|May 28|en|May 28|qid=Q2588|lt=May 28|1=May 28}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Culmination|en|Culmination|qid=Q611114|lt=Shōchū|1=Culmination}} to {{ill|Karyaku|en|Karyaku|qid=Q1327198|lt=Kareki|1=Karyaku}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. == Births == * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1783|en|1783|qid=Q7745|lt=1783|1=1783}} {{ill|May 26|en|May 26|qid=Q2586|lt=May 26|1=May 26}}) – {{ill|Murata Seifū|en|Murata Seifū|qid=Q549711|lt=Murata Seifū|1=Murata Seifū}}, a warrior of the {{ill|Chōshū Domain|en|Chōshū Domain|qid=Q876267|lt=Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain}} and chief retainer ({{ill|Karō|en|Karō|qid=Q1316445|lt=Iemoto|1=Karō}}) (died {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Jōji|en|Jōji|qid=Q1146153|lt=Teiji|1=Jōji}} 6th year / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 22nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1367|en|1367|qid=Q6202|lt=1367|1=1367}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Motouji|en|Ashikaga Motouji|qid=Q4306921|lt=Ashikaga Motoki|1=Ashikaga Motouji}}, the first Kamakura Kubō of the {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} and the second son of {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|qid=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}} (born {{ill|1340|en|1340|qid=Q6056|lt=1340|1=1340}}). * {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|qid=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku|1=Meitoku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1393|en|1393|qid=Q6390|lt=1393|1=1393}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|qid=Q2620|lt=June 6|1=June 6}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-En'yū|en|Emperor Go-En'yū|qid=Q471799|lt=Emperor Gōen'yū|1=Emperor Go-En'yū}}, the 5th emperor of the Northern Court (born {{ill|1358|en|1358|qid=Q6140|lt=1358|1=1358}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|25|4|27|3|26|5|4|0426|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 4월 26일]] [[ja:4月26日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月廿六]]
[[ar:April 26 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿六]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿六]]
